method: Outside-in crawl (browser UA, robots-respecting; Crawl-delay 10, /wp-admin disallowed). WordPress: wp-sitemap.xml → posts, pages (121), custom types nycc_committee (40), nycc_caucus (9), nycc_report (47); districts at /district-1..51/. Legislative data probed via Legistar Web API (403) and cross-referenced to NYC Open Data.
headline_findings: Council is the most API-covered domain so far: a vendor Legistar Web API (webapi.legistar.com/v1/nyc), an OPEN WordPress REST API (council.nyc.gov/wp-json), and 11 NYCC Open Data datasets.
Yet none is an owned, unified, agent-native NYC Council API — the legislative record depends on a Granicus-branded, access-gated vendor API (403 to our client).
51 district/member pages (/district-N/), 40 committees, 9 caucuses, 47 reports — content in WordPress; bills/hearings/votes in Legistar.
Open Data has Members, Legislation (Bills & Local Laws), Discretionary Funding, Participatory Budgeting, Meetings, Committee Membership — flattened snapshots disconnected from Legistar and the site.
See tech-stack.md and apis-observed.md for the vendor + API inventory.

fruit.name: Council Members / District pages
opendata_match: City Council Members (1999 to Present) uvw5-9znb (6c)
fruit.notes: Each /district-N/ page profiles the member: offices, phone, committees, caucuses, legislation, press. Also available via WP REST + Open Data.

fruit.name: Council Districts
fruit.notes: District boundaries published by DCP (not NYCC); maps via CARTO on-site.

fruit.name: Committees
opendata_match: City Council Committee Membership (1999 to 2025) aabe-yfm9
fruit.notes: 40 committees as WP custom posts; membership over time in Open Data; committee bodies also in Legistar.

fruit.name: Legislation (Bills, Resolutions, Local Laws)
opendata_match: City Council Legislation: Bills and Local Laws 6ctv-n46c (15c)
fruit.notes: Full record in Legistar (webapi.legistar.com); a flattened bills/local-laws snapshot on Open Data.

fruit.name: Meetings / Hearings
fruit.notes: Hearing calendar in Legistar; video via Viebit/Livestream; captions via StreamText.

fruit.name: Discretionary Funding
fruit.notes: Member-allocated funding to organizations; rich 27-col dataset.

fruit.name: Testify / speak at a hearing
fruit.notes: Public sign-up to testify at hearings — a transactional civic workflow with no API. The one net-new write surface for this domain.
